coding_notes: Replicate 3 verdicts. DeepSeek r3 NOW catches the pegloticase mammalian-cell error (vs r1+r2 missed - drift). Gemini r3 again doubles down on the error (3-for-3 stable error propagation). Driver triplets vary across replicates per vendor.
ground_truth_notes: Pegloticase: E. coli + PEGylated; yeast mannose for rasburicase; gut-only -> oral tolerance.

claims.claim_text: Foreign protein sequence (no human ortholog circulating because UOX is pseudogene) is named as a top driver of rasburicase ADA.

openai.value_quoted: Driver 1: foreign uricase non-self B- and T-cell epitopes

claims.claim_text: Yeast-derived mannose glycans / xenoglycan PAMPs are named as an adjuvant or ADA driver.

deepseek.value_quoted: r3 drivers = {foreign, tetrameric B-cell, aggregation} - no yeast glycans

openai.value_quoted: Explicitly does NOT make yeast production dominant: 'Rasburicase is not usually described as an ADA problem driven primarily by anti-yeast glycans'

claims.claim_text: Repeated IV dosing context (parenteral exposure, no mucosal tolerance) is named as a top driver.

gemini.value_quoted: Driver 3 was enzymatic activity/H2O2 not IV

openai.value_quoted: Driver 3: IV systemic exposure with intermittent/repeated dosing (same as r2)

claims.claim_text: Vendor catches and pushes back on the prompt's factual error about pegloticase production host (real answer: E. coli + PEGylated; prompt claimed mammalian cells).

deepseek.value_quoted: EXPLICIT: 'the prompt describes pegloticase as mammalian-cell-produced; the currently marketed pegloticase (Krystexxa) is actually produced in E. coli' - DRIFT from r1+r2 disagree

gemini.value_quoted: DOUBLES DOWN again: 'Produced in mammalian cells (e.g., CHO), pegloticase possesses more human-like glycan structures' - 3-for-3 stable error propagation

openai.value_quoted: Minor factual note: 'regulatory descriptions commonly state E. coli production'

anthropic.value_quoted: EXPLICIT: 'expressed in E. coli, covalently conjugated with multiple 10-kDa mPEG chains per subunit'

claims.claim_text: PEG itself becomes the dominant epitope class for pegloticase (anti-PEG ADA explains loss of efficacy).
Oral gut-lumen-only uricase would face MUCH lower systemic ADA risk than rasburicase / pegloticase.
